marketplace.binMinStarting: Buy it now must be at least starting price
marketplace.title: Title
marketplace.notSeller: You can only edit your own listings
marketplace.tradeTypeRequired: Select at least one trade option
marketplace.priceRequired: Price is required for Buy it now
marketplace.startingBidRequired: Starting bid is required for Auction
marketplace.auctionEndFuture: Auction end date must be in the future
marketplace.startingPriceHint: Opening bid; first bid must be at least this amount.
marketplace.reservePriceHint: You will not sell below this. Hidden from bidders. Between starting and Buy it now (if set).
marketplace.buyItNowPriceHint: If a buyer pays this, the auction ends immediately. Must be ≥ starting price.
marketplace.auctionTypeHint: Rising: highest bid wins. Holland: price drops until someone buys at current price.
marketplace.auctionTypeHintRising: Highest bid wins when the auction ends, if it meets the reserve.
marketplace.auctionTypeHintHolland: Price drops at set intervals until someone buys at the current price.
marketplace.hollandDecrementHint: Amount the displayed price decreases each interval. Min 0.01.
marketplace.hollandIntervalHint: How often the price drops (e.g. every 5 minutes).
marketplace.auctionEndsHint: Bidding closes at this time. For rising auctions, highest bid wins if it meets the reserve.
marketplace.auctionSummaryRisingIntro: Start price is {{startingPrice}}. Bids will raise this price.
marketplace.auctionSummaryReserveClause: If the highest bid does not reach {{reservePrice}}, you will not sell it.
marketplace.auctionSummaryBuyItNowClause: You will sell immediately if someone pays {{buyItNowPrice}}.
marketplace.auctionSummaryHollandIntro: Price starts at {{startingPrice}} and drops by {{decrement}} every {{interval}} until someone buys at the current price.
marketplace.hollandPriceDropMin: Price drop must be at least 0.01
marketplace.reserveBetweenStartAndBin: Reserve must be between starting and Buy it now price
marketplace.reserveNotMet: Reserve not met — auction ended without sale.
marketplace.itemPlacedIn: Your listing will be placed in {{city}}
marketplace.citiesVisibilityLabel: Cities where this item will be visible
marketplace.citiesVisibilityHelp: Your item will be visible to users in all selected cities. The primary city is used for the item's chat channel.
marketplace.removeItemDescription: What would you like to do with this listing?
marketplace.markAsReservedDescription: Item is reserved for a buyer
marketplace.withdrawFromSaleDescription: Remove listing without marking as sold
marketplace.hintFree: Item is given away at no cost (0). Buyers can take it for free.
marketplace.hintSuggestedPrice: No fixed price. Buyers will suggest their price in chat; you can accept or negotiate.
marketplace.hintPrice: Fixed price. Buyers pay {{price}} to buy.
marketplace.hintPriceWithNegotiation: Your asking price {{price}}. Buyers see it and can make an offer in chat; you can accept or negotiate.
marketplace.hintStartingPrice: Opening bid; first bid must be at least {{price}}.
marketplace.youAlreadyHaveHighestBid: You already have the highest bid
marketplace.bidTooLow: Bid must be at least the minimum
marketplace.bidMustBeGreaterThan: Value must be greater than or equal to {{min}}
marketplace.buyersWillAppear: Buyers will appear here when they express interest
